title: Slack workspace message-retention settings
description: Workspace message- and file-retention posture from the Slack team-preferences API. SETTINGS only — the retention durations and policy flags, never any retained message or file (slice 443 threat-model I). One record per workspace per run. Feeds data-retention / data-handling evidence.

messages_retention_days.description: Message-retention duration in days; 0 means retain forever.

files_retention_days.description: File-retention duration in days; 0 means retain forever.

retention_enabled.description: True when a non-default retention policy is in force.

reason.description: Human-readable reason when the retention verdict is fail/inconclusive.
